metadataSupplemented.reason: The source content file was only a minimal BPMN.org supplement and did not contain the representative book content or enough BPM method detail.
items: Used local metadata.json to identify the entry as the book 'Fundamentals of Business Process Management' by Marlon Dumas et al.
Used the local Springer link from metadata.json as the representative book locator.
Used the local BPMN.org supplement as official BPMN/OMG context for BPMN 2.0 notation.
Supplemented the operational BPM lifecycle from the local metadata note: process identification, modeling, analysis, redesign, automation, monitoring, and optimization.
